title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCC Freight Market Stabilizes Amid Geopolitics and Tariff Uncertainty - The VLCC market continues to be highly susceptible to external shocks arising from geopolitical risks, escalating marine insurance costs, and potential tariff threats.
